title: The Collier Project
description: This modpack combines dinosaurs, dragons, and terrifying horror mods, including sinister dwellers, GOD, and even the Man from The Fog lurking in the darkness, ready to strike when you least expect it.
body: This modpack combines dinosaurs, dragons, and terrifying horror mods, including sinister dwellers, GOD, and Man from The Fog. It also features Ice and Fire dragons and Fossils and Archeology for prehistoric adventures.
